question: Which region had the Highest EBITDAR Contribution for MGM during FY2022?
answer: Las Vegas Strip Resorts had the highest Adjusted Property EBITDAR contribution for MGM during FY2022 [PAGE 13]. The full year 2022 Adjusted Property EBITDAR was $3.1 billion for Las Vegas Strip Resorts, compared to $1.3 billion for Regional Operations, while MGM China reported a loss of $203 million [PAGE 3][PAGE 4][PAGE 13].
